title: lotus incanus
intro: Lotus incanus, also known as the silver lotus or creeping lotus, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Nelumbonaceae family, native to North Africa, Europe, and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Lotus incanus can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
